title: To designate the facility of the United States Postal Service located at 290 NW Peacock Boulevard in Port St. Lucie, Florida, as the "Trooper Zachary Fink Post Office Building".
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.
plain_summary: This bill gives a new name to a post office building in Port St. Lucie, Florida. The post office is located at 290 NW Peacock Boulevard. It will now be called the Trooper Zachary Fink Post Office Building. All official government papers will use this new name when talking about this building.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.

sections.title: Section 1  Trooper Zachary Fink Post Office Building
sections.text: The post office building located at two hundred ninety Northwest Peacock Boulevard in Port Saint Lucie, Florida, will now be called the Trooper Zachary Fink Post Office Building. This is the official name for this postal service facility. Any time a law, map, rule, document, paper, or other official record mentions this post office building, it must use the name Trooper Zachary Fink Post Office Building.
